---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 3"
page-layout: custom
---

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::::::::: tech-stack-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX03/images/ho_ex03a_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 3-A]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX03/HO_EX03A.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX03/images/ho_ex03b_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 3-B]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX03/HO_EX03B.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::
